entry.title: CAPEX reporting for easy budget control
entry.content:
Hi all,

new to SAP here and it seems nothing is intuitive.

Trying to get a simple monthly CAPEX report, detailing the following for each asset:

  1. Cost Center
  2. Asset details - Cost Center, name, description, category (HW, project, machinery, etc.), Cost element if exist.
  3. Capitalization start + end date, or at least start date and capitalization period.
  4. Asset starting value, monthly depreciation amount, current book value by month
  5. Activated / not activated / expected activation date

I found some answers refering to S_ALR_87012060, others to purhcase additional SAP modules, one answer refering to SAC report (another module I can't use), and other answers which don't provide a simple solution.

Can such a simple business request, a minimum requirement by our budgeting team and function heads to better understand their cost structure, be achieved in SAP by a single transaction? or even a joining of several transactions?

Not using Hanas4.

Thank you

entry.title: Planned Orders with External Procurement in PP/DS
entry.content:
Hello,

In some of our sales plants, we use the classic MRP method to create externally procured planned orders. (Parameters 2 or 3 in MRP). The sales plants are activated for advanced planning with the restriction "Display only".

Unfortunately, these externally procured planned orders are not transferred to PP/DS, neither as planned orders nor as purchase requisitions. Purchase requisitions are transferred correctly from the sales plants.

Is there a solution for this, or is this scenario not supported by PP/DS? (Ancient SAP Notes point to this, but unfortunately, we haven't found anything current on the subject.)

Thank you and best regards

MW

entry.title: Re: Availability control not triggering for Commitments i...
entry.content:
Hello, 

A budget availability control in S4H Cloud public works with semantic tags and YPS2 hierarchy. You need to check if the accounts you use to make PR o PO are included in YPS2 hierarchy (you can find in Manage your solution -Accounting - General ledger - Chart of accounts - Define financial statements versions) CMII-CMII-CMI - Costes.  Also you should check before what groups inside the Costs are part of the semantic tag Actual Costs, cause only this groups SAP use to BAC. 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: "No stock posting posting possible for this material"
entry.content:
Is it happening for only certain material or material type?

check if the Qty update is marked in the material type at vluation level.

entry.title: #CoE#STWX Can I bind JE to China VAT Invoice in 'Create Supplier Invoice'?
entry.content: In app 'Create Supplier Invoice', we can bind MIRO to China VAT Invoice, can we bind JE to VAT Invoice here?

Hi @ygongalov,

How did you solve the formula issue? Would it be possible for you to share your solution? Otherwise we can also network alternatively.

Regards

entry.title: Re: batch determination for same material code into 2 lin...
entry.content: thanks for your comment.

entry.title: Re: Document type field modification (BSART) in the purch...
entry.content:
The document type change may be allowed only in case where document types have same number ranges assigned. check the document type you use for services and then check the number rnage. 

it is a bad practice to chnage the document types once you create the document.

entry.title: Re: batch determination for same material code into 2 lin...
entry.content: thanks for your comment. yes business needs for this behaviour regarding pricing and Free of charge items, so yes we can't add all quantity into same line.

entry.title: Change a GL account assigned to this activity
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Does anybody know how can I solve the following problem?

In the test system we were running some tests and we have created new activity type T036 and we didn’t change a GL account assigned to this activity.  We have created a project, assigned an employee and input some hours.  These hours weren’t posted because a GL account was blocked. 

We changed a GL account in Manage Activity type APP for a right one. 

 

We have created new rates in the APP manage cost rates services

 

But Input the time again in the same project, we have the same error that GL account is blocked.

 

 

When I check the app where -used list activity Types, I can see that this activity type participates in Sending Cost centers in Cost rate Maintenance

 

And when I navigate inside I can see that I have 4 rates and only one with GL account I needed 6290000012

 

 

But in APP manage cost rates services

I have only 2 rates maintained:

 

 

¿Does anybody know how to solve this problem?

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Multiple POD Plugins on the same Plugin Container in POD Designer within SAP Digital Manufacturi
entry.content:
Hi @ManoelCosta there is any way to hide | show Action Button on event ?

ex if you have not done setup the start button will not be visible.

entry.title: Re: SAP ALM as official plugin grafana
entry.content:
Hello Johann,

All matters related to the SAP Cloud ALM plug-in for Grafana can be found in the plug-in Github page.
And the Github Issues page for the plug-in should be used to ask new queries or report issues related to configuration.
You can also take a look at KBA 3450792 - SAP Cloud ALM Grafana plug-in does not display expected data' for troubleshooting.
Hope the above helps.

Best regards,
Ellie

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Hackathon at SAPHILA 2025 (AFSUG Members)
entry.content:
I can't believe the AFSUG SAP BTP Hackathon is already over. After several months and reviewing 18 inspiring SAP BTP use cases, we selected 4 finalists that competed at SAPHILA 2025 in the first ever AFSUG Demo Jam.

A huge shoutout to all the participating teams, and a special mention to the 4 finalists and SAP BTP Hackathon champion.

The four finalists were: 

  • Bell Equipment Limited, represented by @JaminKurik, @brodierose and @AJ-BILL 
  • Debswana Diamond Company, represented by @kotsetswe , @Basetsana , @Collin and @Sekgabo 
  • Deloitte TN represented by @Ghaith-Mkhinini , @Minyar-Meksi @_sarra , @Salsabil07 and @Ghadaa1 
  • And PwC that was also crowned the winner of the SAP BTP Hackathon with their innovative SAP "Legal Ease" use case, represented by @kirsten_lake and @TshepoM 

This was the first edition of the AFSUG SAP BTP Hackathon, but I certainly hope it will not be the last!

Until next time 😀

entry.title: SAC Planning with connection to ERP System
entry.content:
Hello Together,

has anyone done planning in SAC (e.g., cost center planning) with a connection to the SAP ERP system? When connected to the S/4 system, can the actual transaction data from the ACDOCA table be imported into SAC. From SAC, the data can be transferred to the S/4 ACDOCP table. Is it also possible to export the transaction data to the ERP system? To which tables? Is there also a standard ODATA service?

BR

Marm

entry.title: Insert operations of standard network into a network
entry.content:
Hello guys,

I want to insert operations of a standard network into a network.  In the transcation cj20n  You have the opportunity to insert a standard network. But how can I solve this with ABAP code? I couldn't find a function module for it. 

The function modules does not solve my problem. Maybe I used it wrong.

CO_SD_INSERT_LIBRARY_NETW

CO_BT_AFVG_READ_WITH_LOGKEY

entry.title: Re: #CoE#STWX Can I bind JE to China VAT Invoice in 'Crea...
entry.content: Hello Freya, You can only bind MIRO to China VAT invoice in app 'Create Supplier Invoice'. To bind Journal Entry to China VAT Invoices, you need to use app 'Manage Incoming VAT Invoices'. Please select country as China(CN) when you want to run apps above.

entry.title: Re: Manage SAP Build projects as part of your enterprise architecture
entry.content: Great post and thanks for sharing!

entry.title: Tax Calculation Engine & "Verify Tax" Feature in SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Has anyone successfully worked with the Tax Calculation Engine in Central Invoice Management (CIM)?

One of our clients recently faced issues with how taxes are handled in CIM. While the Tax Code is determined correctly, there’s no automatic verification of whether the tax amount on the invoice is accurate. So we were excited when SAP released the "Verify Tax" feature — but now we’re trying to understand how it actually works.

A few key questions I’m hoping someone here can clarify:

  • How does the "Verify Tax" functionality work in detail?

  • We are using S/4HANA Public Cloud as our backend — is the Tax Calculation Engine compatible with that?

  • Why is it mandatory to manually maintain shipping information for tax determination? This is a cumbersome process and not very user-friendly.

  • The documentation for this feature and related APIs is quite limited. For example, what exactly is the role of the "APIs for Internal Tax Engine" mentioned in the SAP Help Portal?

    • APIs for Internal Tax Engine | SAP Help Portal

  • From an end-user perspective — how are they supposed to manage or interact with this?

Would appreciate any insights, best practices, or real-world experience anyone can share!

Thanks and best regards,
Sergen

entry.title: Talent Intelligence Hub Implementation: Key Learnings from Client Projects
entry.content:
Hi Readers,

I've been implementing Talent Intelligence Hub (TIH) for various clients, and I've noticed that the same myths and misconceptions surfaced in every project. Whether it's confusion about prerequisites, concerns about migration complexity, or unrealistic expectations about AI capabilities, these misunderstandings often slow down implementations and create unnecessary stress for project teams.

This isn't another theoretical overview of TIH features. Instead, I'm sharing the practical insights I've gained from actually deploying TIH in real client environments - the stuff that matters when you're in the middle of an implementation and need straight answers. I've consolidated the key learnings from multiple projects to give you the facts without the fluff, based on what I've seen work and what doesn't in practice.

If you're planning a TIH implementation, currently in the middle of one, or just trying to understand what this platform does beyond the marketing materials, this should help cut through the noise and focus on what really matters for a successful deployment.

Getting Started - What You Really Need

You don't need everything perfect to start:
• No need for a complete skills library before you begin
• Don't need your entire job architecture finalized
• Can start with just competencies or a few key skills
• Build and expand over time as you learn

TIH is your central hub for:
• Managing competencies and skills
• Storing talent attributes across SuccessFactors
• Connecting talent processes together

Job Profile Builder remains unchanged:
• JPB doesn't go away when you enable TIH
• Your existing job roles remain intact
• JPB handles job architecture, TIH handles skills and competencies
• They work together, not against each other

More flexibility than you think:
• Store skills, competencies, behaviors, proficiency levels
• Add custom tags and attributes
• Everything lives in the Attributes Library
• Configure what makes sense for your organization

AI features are optional:
• Skill recommendations and inference can be turned on later
• TIH works fine without any AI from day one
• No pressure to use AI if you're not ready

Migration - The Real Story

The process is manageable:
• Migration happens through the Upgrade Center
• Pretty straightforward if you prepare properly
• Data cleanup is essential before you start

Use the Check Tool:
• Built-in tool finds issues with legacy systems
• Checks Job Description Manager, Center of Capabilities, JPB
• Run this early to avoid problems later

Current limitation with JPB skills:
• Skills data in JPB can't migrate automatically yet
• Either wait for SAP to build this or do manual export/import
• Plan for this if you have lots of skills in JPB

Best path forward:
• Move from Job Description Manager to JPB for jobs
• Use TIH for competencies and skills
• This combination works well

What TIH Actually Does

Connects your talent processes:
• Links recruiting, performance, career development, learning
• Creates one source of truth for talent data
• Eliminates the data silos between modules

Growth Portfolio for employees:
• Gives personalized career insights
• Recommends skills based on career goals
• Employees actually use this feature

Skill inference through AI:
• Analyzes what employees do in other systems
• Looks at collaboration tools, learning platforms
• Suggests skills automatically
• Needs to be turned on and configured properly

Integration capabilities:
• Works with other SuccessFactors modules
• Connects to third-party systems through APIs
• Can integrate with learning platforms, collaboration tools

How to Actually Succeed

Start small and grow:
• Pick critical skills or competencies first
• Don't try to do everything at once
• Scale up as you get comfortable

What you need for success:
• Leadership buy-in and support
• Clear rules for data management
• Proper training for users
• Someone to maintain the data ongoing

Treat it as a journey:
• Not a one-time project
• Platform grows with your needs
• Build capabilities over time

My Recommendations

Before you start:
• Clean up your existing data
• Understand what frameworks you're using now
• Plan which TIH features you'll use first

During implementation:
• Use the modular approach
• Focus on data quality from the start
• Train users properly

After go-live:
• Keep maintaining the data
• Gradually add more features
• Monitor how people are using it

Key Takeaways

TIH is a flexible and scalable platform that requires strategic planning and phased implementation to deliver maximum value. Success depends on establishing strong data governance, securing leadership commitment, and treating the implementation as a capability-building journey rather than a single project.

The most successful implementations I've seen focus on three core principles: start with clean, well-governed data; build user adoption through proper training and support; and implement features incrementally based on organizational readiness and business priorities. While AI features like skill inference can add significant value, they work best when built on a solid foundation. Focus on establishing clean data governance and user adoption first, then layer on the advanced capabilities (AI units) as your organization becomes more comfortable with the platform. For implementation teams, remember that TIH's modular approach is actually an advantage. You can demonstrate quick wins with basic functionality while building toward more sophisticated use cases. This approach helps maintain stakeholder confidence and provides time to address data quality and change management challenges systematically.

If you are a Fresher and looking to specialize in Success Factors, check out my blog - Guide to Mastering SuccessFactors Consulting  You will find valuable insights and practical tips to get expertise and establish yourself as an expert in the industry.

If you are planning an SAP SuccessFactors implementation, check out my blog - Prep Guide for a Flawless SAP SuccessFactors Implementation  This expert guide offers critical insights for a flawless project.

If you are looking to get certified in SAP SuccessFactors, check out my blog -The Proven Way to Prepare for SAP SuccessFactors Certification

 With all my experience, here is the checklist I made to find a resourceful consultant. Hope this helps the other recruiters and the SF interview panel while hiring. check out my blog -Things recruiters / interview panel should look into when hiring an SAP SF consultant


Thank you for taking the time to read.

You are welcome to express your views and ask any queries in the comment section of this blog. I would be pleased to impart my knowledge to you.  Share this blog with your colleagues.

Thank you!!

entry.title: sales item text not copied to delivery
entry.content: Hi when I entered text in sales order it is copied in to delivery and I have created another order it is not copied in to the delivery the item category is NCCU for both orders. Then why it is not copied to another order?

entry.title: 导入手工银行对账单后，进行过账处理，未能按照所建规则进行处理过账到预付账款，而是过账到应付账款，系统配置原因处理？
entry.content:
#SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance#导入手工银行对账单后，进行过账处理，未能按照所建规则进行处理过账到预付账款，而是过账到应付账款，系统配置原因处理

1.建立导入对账单处理规则，如下图：

2.导入银行对账单，如下图：

3.过账银行对账单，过账结果如下图：

4.查询导入对账单形成凭证，仍旧形成的是应付账款，而非确定规则想要的预付账款，如下图：


如何确定规则形成预付账款，而非应付；

entry.title: SAP Build Apps APK Build Issue
entry.content:
Hello Everyone, 

 

I recently developed an application using SAP Build Apps, I am using custom Actions to call endpoints, those endpoints are APIs made on SAP Integration Suite. When I preview the app, its working as expected. My problem is when I build it into an APK file and install it, every time I need to hit an endpoint I get an error message saying "Failed to process action inputs for action ACTION_NAME: Invalid Base Url: Resolve://".

I am unable to find what I am doing wrong as every component I test is working fine and the preview is also working fine. I would appreciate if someone at least directs me to the right direction.

NOTE: I am very new to SAP, been working on it for a few months.

entry.title: Re: Import Sales Orders - Part4: Custom fields support
entry.content:
Hi @frank_xie and @eugene_517 
Any suggestions on how to enhance the app on a S/4 system in SAP private cloud, if we like to use other standard SAP fields like VBAP-AUFNR with this app? Is it possible to enhance the service or is the only way to submit a feature requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product?

Thank you and best regards, Emanuel

entry.title: Re: limitations of SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) when it come...
entry.content:
Hi Ujjani

Here are a few updates:

  • Personalization is supported via filter, prompt, bookmark, Bursting
  • Event based schedule is supported via Public API, user can listen to any external event and schedule using public API
  • Enterprise recipient is supported: SAC has an option to use SAC recipient and non-SAC recipient separately and if for security reason some customer wants to disable non-SAC recipient (sending outside tenant user) this can be done. customer can also configure own SMPT server and use it for delivery
  • Prompt and filter are supported in scheduling as it is supported in the SAC story
  • Email destination is supported to both SAC and Non-SAC users
  • Other destination like file server, SharePoint will be delivered in future, Inbox is not required as SAP do not want to retain any data in their landscape for security reason

Hope this helps

Greg

entry.title: Re: SAP C4C SDK 2505: New Visual Studio 2022 based Setup
entry.content:
Hello Saurabh,

as far as what I read, the new installation process will be effective since 2508 release

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CLOUD_APPLICATIONS_STUDIO/cbcebe3cfb1647a8b0322c18dbb0b481/d5278bebf61f4018b7468d669ea3a231.html

For now (2505) it's expected to use the 'old' PILOT installation.

Best!, Jan

entry.title: Update business partner in S/4 using cl_md_bp_maintain
entry.content:
I"m trying to change a business partner"s address data using the cl_md_bp_maintain class. The email address and phone number are updated, but the old numbers are still there. Only the default validity period is entered for the new number. I set the current_state parameter for the numbers to true, but the old numbers remain.

How do I get rid of the older entries?

entry.title: Basic Authentication Fails with “Bad Credentials” When Calling SAP Integration Flow Endpoint
entry.content: I have created an integration flow using HTTPS and registered the service instance. I am using the API endpoint generated by the integration flow and have assigned the service keys. In Postman, I am attempting to authenticate using Basic Authentication with the client ID and client secret from the service key. However, Postman returns a “Bad credentials” error. What can cause that issue?

entry.title: Re: Quantity field is not updating in ACDOCA table during...
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: How to Skip One Branch After the Other Completes in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I'm building a process in SAP Build Process Automation and need help designing the following logic:

  • The process starts with an API trigger.

  • Then, I want to run two parallel branches:

    1. Show an approval form to a user (Process A).

    2. Wait for another API event (Process B).

My goal is:
As soon as either Process A or Process B completes, the other one should be automatically skipped. Only one branch should proceed based on whichever finishes first.

Is there a best practice or pattern to achieve this in SAP Build?
I've tried using branches and flags, but I'm unsure how to control the flow correctly to cancel/skip the other process.

Any guidance or examples would be really appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Quantity field is not updating in ACDOCA table during...
entry.content: Hello, Thanks for your kind reply. I agree with your suggestion. But if that is the case then why system is updating the same quantity field in the BSEG line item both in S4hana and ECC environments. Also I have noted that copa line items in the costing based copa is  updating the quantity information for the same settlement document. But no quantity information is updating in account based copa

entry.title: App ID "F5746" Customer Data Browser object group
entry.content:
Dear all,

I want to register an object group to control what is displayed in Customer Data Browser. I looked at the sap help, assigned the required role "SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT", and confirmed that the target IAM app "S_YI3_39000590_TRAN" is enabled.

There should be no problem with the conditions required for the settings of other systems.

The SSCUI app in question was released in 2502 and is an app permission variant type app, so will this be a bug?

Please let me know if there are any other measures that need to be taken.

regards,

entry.title: Re: Simulation End pause length?
entry.content:
Hi Shane,

Is it possible to change default text that shows in end of every simulations.

I want to change "Practice Mode is Finished" to "Click X to close this pop-up and return to the course".

Thanks

Nagaraj

entry.title: Re: Cannot convert data type from CHAR20 to INT8 in CDS v...
Re: Whitescreen after logging in Public cloud with Zebra...
entry.content:
Hello @FlorisBoon 

Your Zebra MC3300 device runs Android 8.1.0 with Chromium Web View version 67, which is too old to render modern Fiori apps correctly. SAP UI5 apps (used in Public Cloud) now rely on more advanced browser features (e.g. ES6+, updated CSS/JS APIs) that are unsupported in Chromium 67, hence the white screen after login

Recommendation,

Use Enterprise Browser, which is SAP-compatible, Zebra-supported, and ready for modern web apps.

Thank you and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Drive Process-centric SAP S/4HANA Transformation with SAP Signavio
entry.content: @kalprefs Sure, in Signavio, you have full flexibility to map any custom process. You can start from reference or best practices content, or build your process entirely from scratch. With your chosen settings and modeling conventions, you can tailor models, shapes, and attributes to capture exactly the information you need.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Fiori Search Help after Activating Alterna...
entry.content:
We used a workaround by activating the Enterprise Search from below configuration step, on the Functional location object.

Transaction SPRO:

SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Plant Maintenance and Customer Service -> Maintenance Roles -> Maintenance Worker -> Activate Enterprise Search for the Input Help

entry.title: Re: BI Launchpad Log out - Leave Site message
entry.content: Hello. I have exactly the same issue. However, I don't see the "BILP.showWarningDialog.onBrowserAction" parameter in the "FioriBI.properties" file. The installed version is SAP BI 4.3 SP4 P11. Any suggestions please?

entry.title: Re: VAT exchange rate
entry.content:
If the requirement is for SD invoices, the delivery date could be copied to VATDATE and then VATDATE determines exchange rate for VAT, only in FI,  as described in note 3344638.

If you go with manual exchange rate, from this note: 1330330, then this solution would not work because you would need to give exact exchange rate value each time and there is no field for that in SD. But you can write own logic in the user exit. 

Information on the correct VATDATE determination and user exit to use is here: 1947124. Please also note that VAT exchange rate does not translate tax base - it only translates tax amount. There are further notes to address that issue.

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting value should be added in material pric...
entry.content:
Thanks for the detailed scenario and screenshots — your requirement is clear, and this is a known limitation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition when handling subcontracting with service charges on the same material code.

Standard Limitation in Public Cloud:

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, subcontracting POs (item category L) do not support adding a service item (like item category “D”).

  • Therefore, the GRN only updates stock with component value, not the subcontracting charge.
  • Subcontracting charges are posted to expense, not capitalised into inventory value.

Summary:

Requirement

Possible in Public Cloud?

Workaround

Subcontract charge added to GR value

Not by default

Manual FI or adjustment posting

Service line in same PO (as item L)

Not available

Only material + external cost

Stock value by batch in standard apps

Not supported

Custom report with CDS views

 

SAP Note 2715125 – Subcontracting in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori: What’s new for SAP S/4HANA 2022 (on-premise and private cloud)
entry.content:
Hi Thomas, 

Thank you for the super information.  One topic that is very much asked for by our users is to have the block copy function via ctrl y / ctrl c function for the remaining web gui transactions. On reading this blog I asumed that this would now be available also in release 2023 fp2. On testing however I find that this is not the case. An example was copying the text of the descriprion column in a sales order. 

Is there a bug in this version and will it be fixed or is this function not provided in the current version?

Thanks, Eveline

entry.title: Re: How to get quota values & its corresponding year and...

Given query has sufficed the requirement.

entry.title: SOAP API: Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) did not return result or show error via postman
entry.content:
Hi

I am trying to implement the "Post Incoming Payment" functionality in the API, for which I found two main SOAP APIs related to this function, namely Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) and Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous).

Regarding the Post part, after referring to the examples, it quickly completed creation normally; I was able to create DZ and DR type Journal Entries successfully and find them in the system. However, when I tried to use the Clearing API, I used two matching DR and DZ documents. Postman only returned "202 Accepted" and there were no further return values.

From the documentation, I learned that SAP should return a Confirmation request to indicate the final execution result. I set up a WebHook to receive any possible return requests, but I did not receive any requests. Moreover, when I tried to look for the execution results of this request within the system, I couldn’t find any error messages or detailed information about the execution results in the SOAP Error Log or Message Monitoring application.

What I want to know is: how can I view these specific execution results (in the SAP system or through API returns)? Is there an error in my approach to using the Clearing interface?

entry.title: Handling FI documents for outbound deliveries (EWM) – how to carry the work order into FI ?
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using SAP EWM with the outbound delivery process.

In our scenario:

  • Deliveries are created from reservations generated by work orders.
  • At delivery creation, each item correctly carries the originating order, which is visible in the material document (MSEG).
  • However, this order information is not transferred to the FI document (BSEG).

Our goal is to ensure that the work order also appears in the FI document post, in the appropriate field.

The issue:

  • A single delivery may include multiple work orders, resulting in multiple line items in MSEG,
  • But only one total line is created in BSEG, making it difficult to assign each work order individually.

We considered using substitution rules (GGB1/GGB4), but this does not work in our case, as there is only one line in BSEG, with no distinction between the original orders.

The question:

What configuration would allow the work order to be carried through to the FI document generated during goods issue (outbound delivery)?

Any suggestions are welcome: SPRO, BAdIs, enhancements, etc.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Firefighter session maintenance (GRAC_FFSESSION)
entry.content: hi there, in my system the GRAC_FFSESSION does not have the force logoff function. How can i make it appear?

entry.title: Re: DVM App, associated license costs
entry.content: How SAP system data will be sent to DVM app after SolMan end of life?

entry.title: 创建Customer JIT call找不到“Partner Description of Ship-To Party”
entry.content:
Scope item 55F提供了nJIT (Next generation JIT)中supply to customer这部分的功能。有小伙伴在测试55F的时候明明自己创建了完整的Business Partner(Customer)数据，但是在创建Customer JIT call的时候填写“Partner Description of Ship-To Party”字段总是找不到值。这个时候，建议检查如下的数据和配置：

1. 数据：Assign Sold-to Parties（F3894）

2. 配置：

Sales -> Integration -> Assign Customer/Supplier to Sales Organization Data

Sales -> Integration -> Convert External to Internal Partner Numbers

确认以上数据维护完整后，再使用Manag Customer JIT Calls重新创建Customer JIT call。

entry.title: Re: 导入手工银行对账单后，进行过账处理，未能按照所建规则进行处理过账到预付账款，而是过账到应付账款，系统配置原...
entry.content:
常用预定义过账规则： https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/918bca53037f408f91a2295d04ac16bc/1b16bc98571c435792da966b4e3692b5.html?q=posting+rules#loio1b16bc98571c435792da966b4e3692b5__table_posting_rules

其它过账规则例如CN05可以考虑直接用processing rule替代：即直接设置processing rule， 不用设置CN05 posting rule， 然后再测试一下看看。 现在的情况看起来像是设置了CN05，因此上传BS时已执行生效，但是processing rule 19还没执行。这两种rule最好是个二选一的关系， 这是官方说法，Note： As an alternative to posting rules, SAP recommends you to use processing rules. They are the successors of the posting rules and offer improved features for you to efficiently manage your bank statement items.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner – HCM-Integration - Additional Customer Company Code/Sales Area
entry.content:
Hi Andi,

Thank you for the document. I've applied the code and tested it. Everything runs perfectly except partner functions. When we extend the new BP to new sales area, partner functions are copied from reference BP.

Kind Regards

Adnan Ata

entry.title: Unable to get the desired data from REST API to SAC
entry.content:
I have a REST API in SuccessFactors and I need to consume its data in a SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). I have successfully created a import connection, but when trying to import the data, I am unable to see the desired data (employee compensation). I can see the data in POSTMAN. 

Please help me to fix this issue.

entry.title: Re: Inquiry on Allocation of Incidental Costs for Imported Raw Materials
entry.content:
Dear ParkSungwon,

This is a warm reminder. In order to provide a proper answer to your question. Could you please kindly share with us at when and where do you want to allocate the costs? Is it duing product cost planning in material costing? or are you using sales order costing? 

It would be great that you provide with more details with examples. 

Thanks a lot. 

Best Regards,

Eva

entry.title: Re: Bye Bye Passwords!!! Biometric Authentication - SAP IAS
entry.content: great

entry.title: Re: SOAP API: Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous) did...
entry.content:
Hello @dennyy_1986 

Posting a clearing call using the “Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous)” API in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition returns a 202 Accepted response. That indicates the request was received, but execution happens asynchronously

Please refer to these SAP helpful References;

  • SAP API Hub – Journal Entry Clearing (Asynchronous)
  • SAP Help Portal – SOAP APIs in S/4HANA Cloud

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Introducing the new pipeline concept in Cloud Integration
entry.content:
@integrateIT JMS should be supported on trial, you may have to add the capability to your trial account.

Alex

entry.title: CDS view not visible Code List Based on CDS View
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have created custom CDS View developed in ABAP ADT tool.  The view is not visible as Value Help View when I am trying to create in  custom fields and logic App (S4 HANA) . I have selected the type Code List Based on CDS View

Please advise what is missing

entry.title: Unable to create "Switch-Based Feature Toggles"
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

I am currently investigating Switch-Based Feature Toggles.

However, I am unable to create the "Feature Toggle" development object using these steps in either an S/4HANA on-premise system or in the SAP Trial BTP Account ABAP Environment Training system (TRL). In Eclipse ADT, I receive the following error message: "No authorization to create objects of this object type in the selected project." This happens even when using SAP_ALL authorization.

 

I have two questions:

  1. What are the prerequisites to create a "Feature Toggle" object?
  2. Is the "Switch-Based Feature Toggles" the same as the "Switch Framework" (transactions SFW1, ..., SFW5), with the only difference being that one is used in Eclipse ADT and the other in the SAP GUI? Then why it is not available in BTP ABAP Environment? "Feature Toggle" lies below "Switch Framework" in Eclipse create screen:

 

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Ignats

entry.title: Professional services. Employee time with Sales price 0.
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Our client use Professional services and Time and expenses contract type. Employees who participate in project input their hours and then they company bill them to client. We use project specific prices for each employee for each project (Manage Prices- sales, PCP0) y condition table 040

 

 

What we have noticed, and we would like to know if it’s a standard behavior when we have a Sales price 0, SAP includes this posting in Billing document and make a billing rate equal with cost rate.  For example:

 

For some of employee categories our client would like to see at the project costs but not income and also this costs shouldn’t generate revenue recognition.

The only thing that occurred to us, it’s a create an additional billing element with periodic services expenses type, so the employees who’s hours shouldn’t be re-build to client and generate RI can input their ours.

We don’t think it’s the best solution and really hope that SAP has for this case better options.

Does anybody had a similar situation?  Any solutions?

Thank you,

Hi all,

My name is Robin Becquevort and I live in Belgium. Soon I will be writing some blogs about SAP Document and Reporting Compliance!

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Smartfiterbar odata v2 vs macro:filterbar odat...
entry.content:
Hi, 

So in the end I was missing the Searchable.. annotation family on the value helps.
Since a lot of them are custom entities, I also had to implement and handle io_request->get_search_expression.. call instead of the typical get_*filters*

Regards,
Michal

entry.title: No email recipient has been maintained error when condition is maintain in OPD
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I am facing a peculiar situation when trying to leverage Output Control for Maintenance Order Work packs.

When Condition parameter such as Planning Plant, Plant section or OpWorkCenter is maintained in the OPD Email recipient  decision table for Maintenance Job Package, we are getting Error 'No email recipient has been maintained'  when sending Work pack for output.

Please note, the functionality works correctly when no additional condition is maintained.

Please advise. Thanks in Advance.

Warm Regards,

Sourabh Pradhan

entry.title: Re: App ID "F5746" Customer Data Browser object group
entry.content:
Hello @RYOGA_HOSHI 

You've taken the right steps by assigning the SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT role and confirming the IAM app S_YI3_39000590_TRAN is active. Since this SSCUI is an app permission variant introduced in release 2502, but you’re still facing issues, here are a few quick checks:

  • Catalog access,Make sure the right business catalogue is assigned to your role.
  • App variant config.Double-check variant settings in Maintain Business Roles.
  • Cache cleanup, Try logging out and clearing the frontend cache. Backend cache tools like /IWFND/CACHE_CLEANUP may also help (if available).
  • Browser visibility settings, Test with a broader role to rule out filter restrictions.
  • SAP Notes to review,
    • SAP Note 3444179 – General SSCUI troubleshooting
    • SAP Note 3230667 – Customer Data Browser enhancements and IAM constraints

Let me know if you need further information

Best regards,
Chuma

entry.title: Re: Issue with System Copy for S/4HANA server
entry.content: Check the kernel versions of source and target system

entry.title: Factoring solution S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

Is there a standard factoring solution (selling receivables to a third party company) available for SAP S4/HANA Public Cloud? Or is this something we need to solve via development? 

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: I am having issue when trying to initiate Service Ins...
entry.content:
Hi @luka2025 

If you run into issue during enrollment or practice in the learning system please create a new case in our ticketing system
Please make sure to select "Practice Systems" as the “Service Category” and kindly fill out the appropriate form.
When raising an inquiry, include detailed information in the description to help our team assist you better.
Please also check our Practice systems support site https://learning.sap.com/helpcenter/learninghub-subscription/practice-systems  where you find a list of general questions and answers on practice systems, all designed to help you to resolve issues may encounter on SAP Learning.

Kind regards
Margit

 

 

Kind regards

Margit

entry.title: Re: App ID "F5746" Customer Data Browser object group
entry.content:
Hi RYOGA_HOSHI

Your question is a bit unclear about what you are trying to do or control.

Please see these help articles that may help:

Customer Data Browser Help (please see the FAQ here as well)

Customer Data Browser - Restrictions and App Behavior  (Note this Help is planned to be updated in 2602 to be Data Visibility Based on Restrictions, please keep an eye on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Road Map for innovations coming soon )

ADT for Eclipse - Creating Customer Data Browser Objects

I hope this helps

Thank you

Jerry

Can this also be achieved by using custom logic or settings?

Thank you

Johannes

There is a British TV show called "Outnumbered" - makes me laugh every time. The casting is so good, and the kids are fun!

entry.title: Vendor blocked in S4 but External procurement Rel. is still active in PP/DS despite CIF PIR transfer
entry.content: I got post processing records when Purchase req was being sent from PPDS to s4 , error statement said that vendor is blocked in S4, Hence I did a PIR transfer through CIF Integration model. PIR was transfered but seems like vendor details are not transfered Hence the External Procurement relationship was still active. I had to manually delete it so that no more Purchase req will be created using that. My question is , is there any means to update vender related changes to PPDS in s4 hana , which i can schedule a batch job for or Do I have to manually delete External proc relationships in PPDS whenever someone blocks vendor in S4.

entry.title: Managing enumeration in SAP DM stack 2201
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I am trying to manage enumerations in SAP DM ESRS scenario (stack 2201). I am trying to tag them in Office using XBRL mapper.

However the enumeration bar in format Mapping Area is always greyed out.

Could anyone show me what this bar should show if it is not greyed out? I am probably making some mistake in taxonomy, but I need to see the output to understand better how.

Secondly, if I tag an enumeration in excel and I properly insert a value in enumeration bar, which column is supposed to be changed in DM_Variables sheet?

Thanks a lot.

Andrea

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for June – SAP CAP ❄️ 🏔️
entry.content: Thanks for the challenge! @ajay_soreng

entry.title: Re: which ui5 component to be used
entry.content:
Hi @Akash_Kanyadhara ,

The reference image you have provided seems have implemented the progress bar within the toolbar.

This what you can do to achieve the same -

  • add headerToolbar within your table and add the progress indicators there:
  • Fix the width to 10% (or in rem)
 <Table
                    id="timeTable"
                    items="{/TimeRecords}"
                    inset="false"
                >
          <headerToolbar>
                                            <OverflowToolbar>
                                                <ToolbarSpacer />
                                                  <ProgressIndicator
                    percentValue="45"
                    displayValue="45%"
                    width="10%"
                    state="Success"
                />
             </OverflowToolbar>
        </headerToolbar>
  • do not add the progress indicators within your content section

Thanks,

Rithika

entry.title: Question about the parameters to use in the API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/CreateUrlAsAttachment
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to generate an attached URL in the material document header object, using the standard API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV with the CreateUrlAsAttachment entity. But, we are not able to get the API call to successfully generate the URL.

 The main limitation we found is identifying the correct parameters to include . Currently, we are making the  API call, but it returns a 400 error. Please,  find below the parameters we are using:

SemanticObject:''

BusinessObjectTypeName: 'BUS2017'

LinkedSAPObjectKey: '49000005022025'

Url:'https://www.google.com

UrlDescription: 'For

More Info'
MIMEType: 'text/url'
SAPObjectType: 'materialdocument'
HarmonizedDocumentType: 'SL1'

 

 
 
Something may be wrong with the businessobjectTypeName, and we are unsure whether the value we are using is correct. Additionally, we are uncertain about the values for LinkedSAPObjectKey and el SAPObjectType , as we have not been able to determine from the API documentation what should be passed in these parameters.
Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Story Performance Analysis Tool in Report Center: New in 1H 2025!
entry.content: This blog is both information and engaging. Thank you!!

entry.title: Re: error with string type declaration in table
entry.content:
• The STRING type is not supported in transparent tables or when generating Table Maintenance (SM30).

  • This is because STRING is variable-length and only supported in structures or internal tables—not in database tables directly.

entry.title: Re: Retention policy of messages
entry.content:
Hi Jeremy,

Thanks for the information, can you please let us know where is this configuration of aggregated message?

Regards,

Vishal

entry.title: Influence & SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
This is something I planned to blog about for a long time. As some of you know, I manage the influence session for SAP Analytics Cloud. Although it does always seem like it from outside, we put a lot of effort into reviewing the ideas and matching them to our backlog. Influence is not the only source of input we use, but it is one of the most important. It really helps understand the areas where customers have challenges using our solutions.

SAP Analytics Cloud is one of the most trafficked influence sessions in SAP. At any given time there are roughly 4,000 in process requests. In order to act as transparently as possible, product managers made more than 2,000 updates last year. We delivered also delivered features associated with 81 influence requests out of 166 features in total for SAP Analytics Cloud the last 12 months.

We internally manage our influence process using SAP Analytics Cloud and Datasphere models we built ourselves. This has allowed us to tighten our process and become more responsive. We have got pretty good at keeping the most voted items up to date. We still have work to do to make sure all of our submitted items are looked at promptly. This is something I hope to improve in the second half of the year.

That is why I wanted to make 2 updates today:

  1. New Voting Threshold for Quarterly Reviews: It takes a good deal of time for product managers to do detailed reviews on each request and volume of requests over 15 votes is very high. Because of this we have moved the threshold to 25 votes.  This will ensure focus on the most voted ideas. It means the product managers have more time to do better reviews.
  2. I will rename the project from “SAP Analytics Cloud and Digital Boardroom” to “SAP Analytics Cloud”. This is due to the fact that our product strategy is to consolidate our feature development into one story artefact. The Digital Boardroom use case is now the Story presentation mode.

I will continue to make sure we improve our influence process. Please continue to create new items and vote on existing items. If you have any feedback, you can send it directly to me at richard.mooney@sap.com.

Thanks very much to Genevieve Hogan for driving an team of interns to build our models and stories. Thanks to Robert McGrath for co-driving this process with me and for mapping all of our work back to our development process.

We will make further changes later this year to consolidate influence processes for all of Business Data Cloud. This will be a subject of a future blog.

entry.title: the Fiori app “Change Inbound Deliveries – Deliveries expandability
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I have received the requirement to extend the Fiori app “Change Inbound Deliveries – Deliveries” by adding a new custom field. My initial plan was to add this field to the ABAP structure, expose it through the relevant OData entity, and finally enhance the Fiori app using the SAP Business Application Studio.

However, while reviewing the official SAP documentation, I noticed that this app is marked as not extensible.

Could you please let me know whether it is still possible to enhance this standard Fiori app with a custom field? If so, what would be the recommended approach?

Thank you very much in advance for your support.
Jalal

entry.title: Scheduling Agreement Line Item do not display latest price
entry.content:
Hello All,

We observe that Scheduling Agreement line item do not display latest Price.

When we select item and click on Item condition , we observe price is displayed correctly(latest period price), but schedule line item still displays old period's price.

We had updated Item condition with future validity, but now the current date is way passed validity start date, but still schedule line displays old period value.

entry.title: Re: Import Collection Dependency Issue
entry.content:
Hello @peter_munt4,

We raised a ticket to SAP. Consultants fixed the problem and they said "There is a bug, we will fix it on next release".

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting Public Cloud Edition Consolidation Mo...
entry.content: Hi, I would recommend getting familiar with the Consolidation Monitor (New Version) in your testing environment fist. There are some new concepts you might want to read upon in the documentation. I would then recommend to start with a new fiscal period. In case, you plan to utilize the process periods to bundle multiple fiscal year periods, I would suggest starting with at the beginning of a new process period, e.g. new quarter in case of quarterly consolidation.
